case_title: KASWELL, ROBERT et al VS CURTIS, BRAD et al

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE NEED TIME TO RE- CREATE THE DESIGNS IN QUESTION & PREPARE FOR COURT
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADVANCEMENT OF HEARING HAS BEEN DENIED;

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CURTIS DESIGN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT KASWELL, ROBERT KASSWELL, REBECCA SHANDI BEVERAGES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CURTIS DESIGN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,975.36 FILED BY KASWELL, ROBERT KASSWELL, REBECCA SHANDI BEVERAGES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CURTIS, BRAD CURTIS DESIGN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO ADVNCED HEARING TO MONDAY NOV. 8, 1999 AT 1:30 PM GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KASWELL, ROBERT KASSWELL, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CURTIS DESIGN $4,975.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,023.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26160 ON 2-23-00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADVANCEMENT OF HEARINGDATE AND FORWARDED TO 506;

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KASWELL, ROBERT KASSWELL, REBECCA SHANDI BEVERAGES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CURTIS, BRAD CURTIS DESIGN $4,975.36 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,023.36, BRAD CURTIS IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. N0 PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CURTIS, BRAD CURTIS DESIGN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT KASWELL, ROBERT KASSWELL, REBECCA SHANDI BEVERAGES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT. DAVID BRAD REQUEST FOR CONTINANCE TO 11/9/99 AT 10AM, ORDER SUBMITTED TO COMMISS. FOR SIGNATURE

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY CURTIS, BRAD CURTIS DESIGN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KASWELL, ROBERT KASSWELL, REBECCA SHANDI BEVERAGES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT CURTIS DESIGN
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-17-1999, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO NOV-08-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT. REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED BY COMMISS.
